bird.name: Greater double-collared sunbird
bird.summary: The greater double-collared sunbird (Cinnyris afer) is a small bird in the sunbird family. It was formerly placed in genus Nectarinia.

locations.name: 史瓦帝尼
locations.summary: 史瓦帝尼王國（史瓦帝語：Umbuso weSwatini；英語：Kingdom of Eswatini），通稱史瓦帝尼（史瓦帝語：eSwatini；英語：Eswatini），是位於非洲南部的一个內陸國家。史瓦帝尼北、西、南三面均為南非所包…

relations.subject: Greater double-collared sunbird
relations.evidence: The sunbird breeds in southern, eastern and northeastern South Africa and Eswatini
